name: the strict (audit-time) SARIF bus counts a warning-level finding as blocking and goes red
command: node -e 'process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({version:"2.1.0",runs:[{tool:{driver:{name:"tflint"}},results:[{ruleId:"terraform_deprecated",level:"warning",message:{text:"deprecated syntax"},locations:[{physicalLocation:{artifactLocation:{uri:"main.tf"},region:{startLine:1}}}]}]}]}))' > warn.sarif; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/sarif-aggregate.sh" --in warn.sarif --strict 2>e.txt; grep -q 'sarif-aggregate status=red' e.txt && echo strict-warn-blocks 1>&2
